REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (115 Lowell Street, San Francisco, Ca 94112)
Off Calendar Mar-25-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for Scott Hodges.

The sale was confirmed at $795,000.00 to Amina Yee on behalf of Yu Rong He and Yu Mei Zhang based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to receipt and review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $25,000.00 is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.
